历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4860 → 6049 → 48177 (a gap in 2023) → 12000 → 10271. After an abnormal gap in 2023, it rebounded significantly in 2024 and continued to recover to 10271 in 2025, showing a clear warming trend in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10271. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 90 in 2021, 92 in 2022, 93 in 2023, 92 in 2024, and 92 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 97, an increase of 5 students (about 5.4%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a slight decline from 27th in recent years, still among the top engineering universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus voyeurism incidents (34 negative out of 35 total incidents), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 87th with average reviews, and short video exposure is relatively low. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 9 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and other advantageous majors of South China University of Technology were rated as highly recommended/recommended from 2024 to 2025, with continuously increasing popularity. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 365,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), slightly up from 363,000 in 2025. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch rose from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, indicating a tightening competitive environment. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, with no regional preference advantage for local candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0%, a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the slight 5.4% enrollment expansion in 2026, a slight increase in the number of provincial candidates, and the rise in the provincial control line, the intensified competition effect from expansion and the inertia of ranking recovery offset each other. Negative reputation incidents may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, but the university's strong engineering majors are highly popular and its level is stable. The overall ranking is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 10271. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10656, with a range of 10156–11156.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10156–11156, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<10156), prioritize Tier 1 AI/Computer Science flagship majors. If the ranking is near the upper limit (>11156), focus on Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Classes, while considering some Tier 2 majors. South China University of Technology has outstanding engineering capabilities, and majors such as Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Automation offer excellent employment prospects, making it worth serious consideration.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1549 → 1931 → 2072 → 1919 → 2295, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 746 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2295; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 22 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 21 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 25, an increase of 4 (about 19%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, intensifying competition and causing ranking numbers to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 25–32 range in recent years, indicating a solid school level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus voyeurism incidents, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking is 87th, with average reviews; Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology is A, Materials Science and Engineering is A, Environmental Science and Engineering is A, Food Science and Engineering is A, Architecture is A-, but the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, etc.) have low relevance to the school's advantageous engineering disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law in 2024 shows differentiation and wait-and-see, Economics categories show differentiation and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication in 2023 is clearly discouraged, overall popularity of History Category related majors is neutral or differentiated; the province's 2026 History Category examinees are about 245,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase from 244,000 in 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, indicating a tightening competitive environment; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, with no regional preference advantage for provincial candidates; the university's History Category enrollment scale in Hebei Province is relatively small (about 20–25 people), belonging to a low-to-medium scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 19% expansion in the 2026 plan, a slight increase in provincial examinee numbers, and the rise in the provincial control line, the large expansion is the main factor, intensifying competition and increasing ranking numbers; however, the low relevance of History Category enrollment majors to the school's advantageous engineering disciplines and the differentiation in related major popularity may partially offset the expansion effect; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2527, with a range of 2148–2906.
